doc_title: van Berg, Kowalski & Wright (2025). Learning-Styles-Matched Instruction: A Meta-Analysis of 124 Studies. Educational Psychology Review, 37(3), 612-651.
label: fabricated
reason: The document cites future publication dates and reports results that directly contradict the overwhelming consensus in educational psychology regarding the lack of evidence for learning styles.
response_turn1:
